sgTip: Get Haste on Tidus before the Crawler fight in Lake Macalania — it transforms the fight. Use Lv. 1 Key Spheres to unlock the node if needed.

subLocations.name: Macalania Woods
subLocations.prose: The woods maze branches frequently — there's a hidden Sleepy Cait Sith behind a tree trunk early on the left. O'aka is set up on the main Lake Road path; the butterfly chase mini-games in the clearing sections are optional but reward a useful item for completing both. Primer XVI is found later with Clasko near the Lake Macalania Travel Agency — the woods themselves just have chests and field encounters.

bosses.strategy: Spherimorph's weakness cycles based on the last element cast. Pattern: Fire → weak to Ice, Ice → weak to Thunder, Thunder → weak to Water, Water → weak to Fire. Use Lulu to exploit the cycle. Auron's Shooting Star works regardless of element. HP: 12,000.
